emails.subject: Re: Change Order #1 to ABB Purchase Agreement
emails.subject_base: Change Order #1 to ABB Purchase Agreement
emails.body: Please print and fax the email and the attachment. I emailed Jeff and told him what I'm up to today, by the way. Kay Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 11/15/2000 09:50 AM From: Ben F Jacoby ECT 11/14/2000 07:45 PM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT
